function.name: _company_role_create
function.description: Create a new role in the company. Roles are used to assign permissions to users across the company.

key.description: Role unique identifier (must be unique within the company). Must use camelCase naming, only English letters and numbers, no underscores or special characters.

name.description: Role name (must be unique within the company). Used for display in the interface.

remark.description: Role description, explaining the responsibilities and usage scenarios.

permissionIds.description: Set of permission IDs assigned to this role (optional).

rowNumber.description: Display order number (optional). Lower numbers appear first.
